QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ntripServerConnectEnabled
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Connect to NTRIP server using specified address/port
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Connect to NTRIP server

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ntripMountpoint
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: NTRIP mount point. Leave blank for RTCM over TCP
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Mount Point

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ntripWhitelist
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Comma-separated RTCM message IDs to forward (e.g. 1005,1077,1087). Leave blank for all messages.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: RTCM Message Filter

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ntripUseTls
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Connect using TLS/SSL encryption (required for some SPARTN casters on port 2102)
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Use TLS encryption

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ntripUdpForwardEnabled
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Forward received RTCM correction data via UDP to the specified address and port
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: UDP forward RTCM data

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ntripUdpTargetAddress
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: IP address to forward RTCM data to via UDP
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: UDP target address

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: ntripUdpTargetPort
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Port to forward RTCM data to via UDP
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: UDP target port
